assertions.text: Executive summary conveys the essential point in under two sentences
Output uses standard memo format with To/From/Date/Subject header
Memo ends with explicit next steps or No action required

exec-summary.note: Executive summary: data breach detected, ICO notified, holding statement needs approval

next-steps-clear.note: Next steps: approve holding statement, designate spokesperson, schedule follow-up meeting

exec-summary.note: Executive summary: office moving June 1, details to follow

next-steps-clear.note: Explicitly states: No action required at this time

exec-summary.note: Executive summary: clinical trial adverse reaction, trial paused, board approval needed for comms strategy

next-steps-clear.note: Next steps: approve communications strategy, approve review panel terms, schedule emergency board call
